meaning: n.[鍖籡缁炵棝,鐤濈棝,鐤濇皵
examples: Colic is almost always gone in four months.
The pain, termed renal colic, was my body straining to expel it.
Big Ben also had two really bad attacks of colic and unlike most horses, Ben made it through.
Eczema, reflux, colic, diarrhoea and even constipation may be caused by an underlying milk allergy.
Dubai Millennium was attempting to recover from colic surgery after falling ill at Dalham Hall Stud in Newmarket.
